scripts.deploy-backend: yarn build-backend && yarn workspace @alexandria/functions push-images-processing && yarn apply-infra
scripts.build-frontend: yarn workspace @alexandria/infrastructure output && yarn workspace @alexandria/web-client-v2 build
scripts.sync-frontend: aws s3 sync packages/web-client-v2/dist s3://$(cd packages/infrastructure && terraform output -raw webclient_bucket) --delete
scripts.deploy-frontend: yarn build-frontend && yarn sync-frontend && yarn workspace @alexandria/infrastructure invalidate-frontend
